nasb.text: Then Bathsheba bowed with her face to the ground, and prostrated herself before the king and said, “May my lord King David live forever.”

esv.text: Then Bathsheba bowed with her face to the ground and paid homage to the king and said, “May my lord King David live forever!”

cnv.text: 於是拔示巴面伏在地，向王叩拜，說：“願我主大衛王萬歲！”

ccb.text: 拔示芭就向王俯伏下拜说：“我主我王万岁！”
